metrics.name: deploy_marker
metrics.description: 1 at the timestamp a new version was rolled out

logs.message: NullPointerException in ChargeHandler.parseGatewayResponse: gateway 'reference' field missing
500 Internal Server Error: unhandled exception processing /charge

expected_root_cause.summary: A regression in deploy v2.4.0 (unhandled missing 'reference' field in gateway response) causes a 5xx spike beginning right after rollout. Rolling back to v2.3.7 should restore the error rate.
key_signals: 5xx ratio jumps immediately after deploy_marker at 14:28
NullPointerException tied to new ChargeHandler code
error onset aligns with version change v2.3.7 -> v2.4.0
